## How it was tested

<!--
Which suites you ran, plus anything you checked by hand in the browser.
Say if you tested offline mode, online mode, or both.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] Server suites pass, or the change doesn't touch `server/`
- [ ] Docs updated in this PR if behavior, save schema, menus, the online layer, or deployment changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests, or explained above why the change isn't practically testable
- [ ] No new extracted game assets committed, and no hardcoded `/assets/...` paths (use `src/base.ts`)
